features.name: LearnDash LMS
features.description: The most trusted WordPress LMS plugin for creating and selling courses.

features.name: MemberDash
features.description: Membership and content restriction functionality.

features.name: Gradebook
features.description: Easily customize, track, and share scores with Gradebook. Explore student progression and scores in simple, flexible gradebook tables, and share individual scores and progress with students and their parents.

features.name: Groups Plus
features.description: Groups Plus modifies LearnDash Groups Hierarchy to create Organizations. Using WooCommerce, you can create and sell entire Organizations and allow your customers to purchase individual course seats within their Organization.

features.name: Instructor Role
features.description: Add multiple course authors without compromising site security by creating roles with restricted back-end access to Course Authors.

features.name: Notes
features.description: The Notes add-on makes note-taking simple and facilitates instructor communication during study time with an intuitive and flexible toolset.

features.name: ProPanel
features.description: Real-time reporting dashboard for course activity and student progress.

features.name: Ratings, Reviews & Feedback
features.description: Full control over the display of ratings and reviews, set custom templates, and make your courses better with student feedback.

features.name: Group Registration
features.description: Group registration and seat management for LearnDash courses.

features.name: Achievements
features.description: Award badges and points for learner milestones and accomplishments through gamification.

features.name: Certificate Builder
features.description: Build certificates using a drag and drop builder through the standard WordPress Gutenberg editor.

features.name: Elementor
features.description: Use the powerful editing capabilities of Elementor to build your course exactly how you want it.

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Configure various notifications to be sent out automatically based on what learners do and do not do in a course.

features.name: WooCommerce
features.description: Sell your LearnDash courses with the WooCommerce shopping cart.

features.name: Integrity
features.description: Protect your course and website from spam, abuse and the copying of your content by students.

features.name: Events Calendar
features.description: Connect an event with a course or group and automatically enroll the user using The Events Calendar.

features.name: Zapier
features.description: Create Zaps that include LearnDash activities, connecting with over 300 applications.

features.name: Migrations
features.description: Bring your course content over from other learning management systems like LearnPress, Tutor LMS, Sensei LMS, or Lifter LMS.

features.name: Paid Memberships Pro
features.description: Create membership level access and associate the access levels to LearnDash courses with Paid Memberships Pro.

features.name: Easy Digital Downloads
features.description: Sell LearnDash courses using the Easy Digital Downloads shopping cart.

features.name: MemberPress
features.description: Create membership levels in MemberPress and associate them to LearnDash courses with auto-enrollment.

features.name: Gravity Forms
features.description: Create custom course registration forms and auto-enroll users with Gravity Forms.

features.name: bbPress
features.description: Add forums to your courses with bbPress, protecting them so only enrolled users can view and post.
